task_title: Search disagrees with list — figure out why

scores.justification: Agent ran `ctl list orders --limit 5 --format json` (message[8]) showing o001 exists, and `ctl search --query "order" --scope orders` (message[8]) returning empty results, demonstrating the disagreement.

Agent identified the stale search index as the root cause by examining the source code (cmd_search.py, message[45]) which shows the stale index simulation for pipe-07 collateral refunds (o088, o091), and confirmed pipe-07 had run partially (message[49]).
Agent explicitly ran `ctl search --query "order" --reindex` (message[36]) and `ctl search --query "order" --scope orders --reindex` (message[38]), proposing the --reindex flag as the fix.

After running --reindex, the agent did not verify that search now matches list; the reindex queries returned empty results (messages[36-39]), and the agent never re-ran a search without --reindex to confirm the fix worked.
